_meta.purpose: Phase 0 content inventory — the complete, reviewable extract of every editable word, number, image, video, and link from the static prototype. Doubles as the seed source for Phase 5 (scripted import into Payload). Sign off on this = 'nothing is lost'.
_meta.note:
Emphasis kept inline as //
. Titles that animate line-by-line are stored as arrays of lines.

lines: whether it can endure the slow

seo.title: JV Ventures — Reimagining Investing
seo.description: JV Ventures is a value-creation partner with a $550M portfolio, building institutional platforms across education, lifesciences, healthcare, and managed living.
seo.ogDescription: A value-creation partner building institutional platforms across education, lifesciences, healthcare & managed living.

slides.copy: Traditional investing measures profit; we measure impact through Sphere of Influence, where capital shapes societal outcomes.

Economic corridors hold untapped potential often constrained by gaps in social infrastructure. These white spaces are identified and transformed into GRIDS (Growth-Ready Innovation Destinations) integrating platforms that combine high-quality real assets with enabling services to create cohesive, high-performance ecosystems.
slides.backgroundImageAlt: Aerial view of a JV Ventures GRID, Growth-Ready Innovation Destination, with education, hospitality, healthcare, contract research, and labspace zones labelled across the corridor

slides.copy: A 10 year legacy, $550 Mn AUM across lifesciences, education, healthcare, and managed living built on the belief that assets are catalysts for societal transformation, not standalone plays. Unified into four platforms PowerEd, PoweRx, PowerCare and PowerPod these systems are designed to interconnect, unlock synergies, and amplify impact beyond sectors.

strips.desc: An all-encompassing K-12 education platform cultivating vibrant learning environments.
Purpose-built lab infrastructure and cutting-edge contract research.
Integrated healthcare infrastructure and strategic investments.
Simplified, flexible, quality living for today’s professionals.

hero.subtitle: A builder of opportunities and businesses
hero.intro: Founded in 2015, JV Ventures has evolved into a value-creation partner with a $550 million investment portfolio. Built on a 10+ year legacy of pioneering innovative models in lifesciences and education infrastructure, rooted in identifying structural gaps and building around them with clarity and conviction.
hero.intro2: The focus remains on innovation and strategic investment in socially relevant infrastructure while continuously introducing new models that challenge conventional approaches and unlock scalable value.
hero.ledgerCaption: Delivering multidimensional value to investors, operators, communities, and society at large

platformsSection.copy: Purpose-built ventures shaping education, lifesciences, healthcare, and managed living through scalable infrastructure and enduring operating models.

cards.desc: An all-encompassing education solution that cultivates vibrant learning environments and enriched student experiences.
A lifesciences ecosystem driving innovation with purpose-built infrastructure & cutting-edge research.

Platform reimagining simplified, flexible, and quality living for today's professionals.

models.copy: Building the institutional foundations shaping the future of education, lifesciences, healthcare, and managed living infrastructure.

rows.title: PropCo Structures in Education Infrastructure
rows.desc: Structures that separate real estate ownership from school operations unlocking capital efficiency, strengthening asset management.

rows.title: Institutional Operating Models for Schools
rows.desc: Institutionally governed operating frameworks bringing discipline and sustainable growth to mid-market education.

rows.title: Experience Centric Healthcare Infrastructure
rows.desc: Reimagining healthcare environments through patient and practitioner first design and experience.

rows.title: Lifescience Real Estate Leasing Platform
rows.desc: Building flexible, modular lab infrastructure for lifesciences companies, enabling access to world-class facilities without heavy upfront investment.

grids.copy: GRIDS transform fragmented high growth corridors into integrated ecosystems powered by education, lifesciences, healthcare, managed living, and community infrastructure.
grids.morphAlt: A fragmented corridor transforming into an integrated GRIDS ecosystem

founders.name: Jasmeet Chhabra
founders.bio: Jasmeet brings deep expertise in real estate, infrastructure, capital markets fundraising, and private equity investing. With over 20 years of experience, he has built a strong track record in identifying opportunities, scaling platforms, and creating high-impact ecosystems.
founders.bioFull: Under his leadership, JV Ventures focuses on ideation, innovation, and strategic investments in socially relevant and alternative assets. The firm has successfully conceptualized and executed investment strategies, deploying over USD 400 million across lifesciences, education, healthcare, and managed habitats, while building integrated and value-driven ecosystems within each sector.

founders.name: Vishal Goel
founders.bio: Vishal is an alumnus of Harvard Business School and the Harvard University Graduate School of Design. With over two decades of experience, he co-founded JV Ventures and has led entrepreneurial ventures across education, lifesciences, healthcare, and managed habitats. JV Ventures has conceptualized and executed investment strategies deploying over $600 million across sectors.
founders.bioFull: Vishal has deep expertise in building integrated ecosystems. As an advisor to the Andhra Pradesh government, he helped draft India's first Biotech Policy and played a key role in developing Hyderabad's Genome Valley cluster under the PPP model, attracting major global pharmaceutical investments. He also worked with three other state governments to establish biotech parks.

platforms.name: PowerEd
platforms.tagline: An all-encompassing K-12 education platform cultivating vibrant learning environments across the full lifecycle of the education experience.
platforms.intro: PowerEd builds the institutions, the operating models, and the everyday services that let schools focus on learning, from the buildings themselves to the buses that reach them.

ventures.name: Cappella
ventures.desc: Pan-Asian edu-infra solutions, sale/leaseback, development, and acquisitions across the spectrum, spanning India and Dubai.

ventures.name: Crimson
ventures.desc: Enhancing the mid-market K-12 school experience with a growing South-West India presence.

ventures.name: Inventre
ventures.desc: Seamless service for design and management of school supplies, integrated with technology across schools.

ventures.name: Abeona
ventures.desc: Tech-driven school transportation ensuring safe, reliable, and convenient journeys with a growing commitment to sustainability.

platforms.name: PoweRx
platforms.tagline: A lifesciences ecosystem driving innovation through purpose-built infrastructure, advanced research environments, and integrated support services.
platforms.intro: PoweRx creates enabling ecosystems that combine world-class laboratories, specialised operational services, and collaborative environments, letting scientists, researchers, and businesses focus on discovery, development, and growth.

ventures.name: NXT
ventures.desc: Tailored infrastructure solutions for dynamic lifesciences clusters, modular & customized environments, build-outs, campus management, and flexible ownership models.

ventures.name: GVRP
ventures.desc: An integrated research platform offering drug discovery and preclinical solutions for pharma and biotech companies.

platforms.name: PowerCare
platforms.tagline: A healthcare solutions network designed around patient and practitioner needs, creating seamless care experiences through thoughtfully planned environments and high-quality infrastructure.
platforms.intro: PowerCare reimagines where care happens: experiential medical environments and flexible clinical spaces built around the people who deliver and receive care.

ventures.name: The Medical Centre
ventures.desc: Experiential environments for healthcare professionals and operators. First centre launched in Hitech City, with a 5-year target of 35–40 centres.

ventures.name: Edge Clinic
ventures.desc: Multidisciplinary co-working spaces for doctors with flexible terms, enabling healthcare professionals to practice independently.

platforms.name: PowerPod
platforms.tagline: An infrastructure platform reimagining how professionals live, from purpose-built living spaces to integrated hospitality experiences.
platforms.intro: PowerPod brings institutional discipline to hospitality and living, delivering curated dining, lifestyle, and service experiences for professionals across cities.

ventures.name: Madison
ventures.desc: A unified platform for diverse hospitality offerings, enriched by institutional partnerships, delivering curated dining, lifestyle, and service experiences for professionals.
